mapper.select: SELECT l.lawyer_id, l.name, l.avatar, l.phone, l.law_firm, l.practice_years, l.rating, l.status, l.audit_status, l.audit_remark, l.description, l.create_time, l.update_time, l.license_no, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT s.name) AS specialty, COALESCE(JSON_ARRAYAGG(JSON_OBJECT('id', s.specialty_id, 'specialtyId', s.specialty_id, 'name', s.name)), JSON_ARRAY()) AS specialties FROM lawyer l LEFT JOIN lawyer_specialty ls ON l.lawyer_id = ls.lawyer_id LEFT JOIN specialty s ON ls.specialty_id = s.specialty_id WHERE l.audit_status = 1 AND l.status = 1 GROUP BY l.lawyer_id, l.name, l.avatar, l.phone, l.law_firm, l.practice_years, l.rating, l.status, l.audit_status, l.audit_remark, l.description, l.create_time, l.update_time, l.license_no

SELECT l.lawyer_id, l.name, l.avatar, l.phone, l.law_firm, l.practice_years, l.rating, l.status, l.audit_status, l.audit_remark, l.description, l.create_time, l.update_time, l.license_no, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT s.name) AS specialty, COALESCE(JSON_ARRAYAGG(JSON_OBJECT('id', s.specialty_id, 'specialtyId', s.specialty_id, 'name', s.name)), JSON_ARRAY()) AS specialties FROM lawyer l LEFT JOIN lawyer_specialty ls ON l.lawyer_id = ls.lawyer_id LEFT JOIN specialty s ON ls.specialty_id = s.specialty_id WHERE l.audit_status = 1 AND l.status = 1 GROUP BY l.lawyer_id, l.name, l.avatar, l.phone, l.law_firm, l.practice_years, l.rating, l.status, l.audit_status, l.audit_remark, l.description, l.create_time, l.update_time, l.license_no ORDER BY l.rating DESC, l.practice_years DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT DISTINCT l.lawyer_id, l.name, l.avatar, l.phone, l.law_firm, l.practice_years, l.rating, l.status, l.audit_status, l.audit_remark, l.description, l.create_time, l.update_time, l.license_no, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT s.name) AS specialty, COALESCE(JSON_ARRAYAGG(JSON_OBJECT('id', s.specialty_id, 'specialtyId', s.specialty_id, 'name', s.name)), JSON_ARRAY()) AS specialties FROM lawyer l JOIN lawyer_specialty ls ON l.lawyer_id = ls.lawyer_id JOIN specialty s ON ls.specialty_id = s.specialty_id WHERE l.audit_status = 1 AND l.status = 1 AND s.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{specialty}, '%') GROUP BY l.lawyer_id, l.name, l.avatar, l.phone, l.law_firm, l.practice_years, l.rating, l.status, l.audit_status, l.audit_remark, l.description, l.create_time, l.update_time, l.license_no

SELECT l.lawyer_id, l.name, l.avatar, l.phone, l.law_firm, l.practice_years, l.rating, l.status, l.audit_status, l.audit_remark, l.description, l.create_time, l.update_time, l.license_no, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT s.name) AS specialty, COALESCE(JSON_ARRAYAGG(JSON_OBJECT('id', s.specialty_id, 'specialtyId', s.specialty_id, 'name', s.name)), JSON_ARRAY()) AS specialties FROM lawyer l LEFT JOIN lawyer_specialty ls ON l.lawyer_id = ls.lawyer_id LEFT JOIN specialty s ON ls.specialty_id = s.specialty_id WHERE l.audit_status = 0 GROUP BY l.lawyer_id, l.name, l.avatar, l.phone, l.law_firm, l.practice_years, l.rating, l.status, l.audit_status, l.audit_remark, l.description, l.create_time, l.update_time, l.license_no
